name: MonoGame
description: Open-source reimplementation of XNA Framework for shipping 2D/3D games in C# across Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android, and consoles. Used by Stardew Valley and Celeste.

seo.title: MonoGame — Game Development Tools
seo.meta_description: MonoGame: Open-source reimplementation of XNA Framework for shipping 2D/3D games in C# across Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android, and consoles. Used by Stardew

when_to_use: C# indie game cross-compiled to Windows, Mac, and Linux
Stardew Valley-style top-down RPG built with XNA-compatible API
Console port target added to existing PC game via MonoGame
Open-source game engine chosen to avoid Unity pricing changes
2D platformer game jam project built with full C# control

pros: Ships pure C# games to desktop, mobile, and consoles
Proven on hits like Stardew Valley and Celeste
Full source control, no black-box engine runtime
Active community keeping XNA spirit alive
cons: No editor or scene tool — pure code framework
Asset pipeline (MGCB) has rough UX edges
Console ports require paid third-party assistance
Smaller plugin ecosystem than Unity or Godot
review.verdict: Framework for C# devs who want total control; youll write your own editor and tools along the way.
review.best_for: Experienced C# developers who want zero engine lock-in and total control
review.not_for: Designer-led teams needing visual scene editors and asset workflows
